message:
fix(correlated-subquery): detect LIKE/GLOB in correlated subquery detection + use alias in is_correlated_subquery

expr_has_external_column_ref fell through to `_ => false` for Expr::Like,
causing correlated subqueries with LIKE in WHERE (e.g. `WHERE p.name LIKE
c.pattern`) to be eagerly evaluated as standalone queries where outer refs
can't resolve. Added handlers for Like, Exists, and Subquery.

Also fixed is_correlated_subquery to use the table alias (not raw name) as
the inner table identifier, since column refs inside aliased subqueries
use the alias.

Includes 40+ new conformance oracle tests and removes stale debug prints
from VDBE codegen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
